name: internix-api
description: Internix candidate registration and dashboard backend

scripts.build: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/db.js && node --check src/models/Candidate.js && node --check src/controllers/candidateController.js && node --check src/controllers/paymentController.js && node --check src/controllers/offerLetterController.js && node --check src/middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check src/middleware/errorMiddleware.js && node --check src/routes/candidateRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/paymentRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/offerLetterRoutes.js && node --check src/utils/generateToken.js
